overall.description: A third-person gameplay sequence from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through a foggy, orange-tinted futuristic city at dusk. The character navigates past modern buildings with digital billboards, palm trees, and increasingly crowded sidewalks, with the environment transitioning from a commercial plaza to a busy street with parked vehicles.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered walkway along commercial building with holographic displays

events.description: character begins turning left to exit the covered walkway along the building

agents.ego_description: walking along the building facade with holographic displays, moving steadily toward the corner

entered.detail: glowing green holographic cube displaying tourist information and a map
large digital screen mounted on building showing a woman's face with red checkmark graphics
tall palm tree trunk visible against the orange fog
modern building wall with large digital displays and illuminated windows

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a modern commercial building featuring large digital billboards and a glowing green holographic tourist information sign. Palm trees line the walkway as the character moves through the foggy, orange-tinted environment toward a corner.

scene_state.functional_zone: residential street with mid-rise apartment buildings

events.description: exits the commercial building walkway and enters the open street with residential buildings
massive skyscraper with horizontal lighting strips comes into view ahead

agents.ego_description: turning left at the corner and walking toward the residential district, then orienting toward the distant skyscraper

entered.detail: multi-story building with balconies and illuminated windows
tall street light pole with dual lamps

segments.scene_description: The character turns left onto a street lined with a multi-story residential apartment building featuring balconies. As they proceed, the view opens up to reveal a massive illuminated skyscraper in the distance, dominating the foggy skyline.

scene_state.functional_zone: open plaza approaching mega skyscraper with highway overpass

events.description: approaching the highway overpass structure with directional road signs visible overhead

agents.ego_description: walking steadily toward the towering skyscraper, passing under the highway overpass structure

notable_agents.action: walking in the same direction ahead of the character on the plaza

entered.detail: massive tower with distinctive horizontal illuminated strips cutting through the fog
elevated highway structure with support columns
overhead road sign structure with green directional markers

segments.scene_description: The character walks through an open plaza area toward a massive skyscraper with distinctive horizontal lighting strips. A highway overpass with directional signs becomes visible overhead as the character approaches the intersection.

scene_state.functional_zone: city street with parked cars and traffic barriers

events.description: entering the street area with parked vehicles and red-white concrete barriers
graffiti-covered wall becomes visible on the right side of the sidewalk

agents.ego_description: walking along the street sidewalk, navigating past concrete barriers and approaching the parked cars

notable_agents.action: walking ahead on the sidewalk wearing distinctive red pants

entered.detail: row of parked vehicles along the street curb
red and white striped concrete traffic barriers
wall with white graffiti tags and markings

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a city street lined with parked cars and red-and-white concrete barriers. Street lights illuminate the foggy atmosphere as a wall with white graffiti comes into view on the right, and other pedestrians become more numerous.

scene_state.functional_zone: busy pedestrian sidewalk with graffiti-covered walls

events.description: pedestrian density increases significantly on the sidewalk with multiple people visible

agents.ego_description: navigating through the increasingly crowded sidewalk, passing pedestrians walking in both directions

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in red jacket walking toward the character
pedestrian in white shirt and red cap walking in the opposite direction

segments.scene_description: The character continues along the crowded sidewalk, passing by numerous pedestrians. The graffiti-covered wall runs along the right side while parked cars line the left, with street lights cutting through the thick orange fog.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a foggy, orange-tinted futuristic city that transitions from a quiet commercial plaza into a crowded urban street. It begins by following the character past modern buildings with glowing green holographic signs and palm trees before turning left onto a residential street lined with balconies. As the character proceeds, the view opens up to reveal a massive illuminated skyscraper dominating the skyline, leading the way through an open plaza toward a highway overpass. The scene then shifts toward a city street where red-and-white concrete barriers and parked cars appear, while the atmosphere becomes more dense with street lights and white graffiti. Finally, the camera continues along the sidewalk as the environment grows increasingly crowded with pedestrians moving through the thick, glowing fog.
